content.en:
After testing the cultivation situation, Ye Tian came to the Origin Will Monument where he tested the Origin Will to test his Origin Will.

He had been using the ruin yang liquid to refine his Origin Will over the years, and coupled with his cultivation to break through to the Origin Realm, his Origin Will had increased a lot.

Soon, the Origin Will Monument arrived.

Ye Tian tested it.

Airplanes!

The Monument of the Origin Will shines brightly.

Soon, a number emerged.

【1200】

The number of the Origin Will in the Origin Realm fluctuates between 100 and 10,000, and 1200 is not bad.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian went to test his Origin Rule Realm on the other side again, and he had already reached the eight-point realm.

"If you want to make rapid progress in the Origin Rules of the other side, you have to arrange the Void Origin Formation and comprehend the Origin of the Land on the Eternal Other Shore, so that you can comprehend the realm of the Origin Rules of the Other Shore. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And to arrange the Void Origin Array, you need high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

He had searched for countless years on the other side of the Seventy-two Eastern Domains, and as a result, he had also found a lot of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

It's just that after cultivating to break through to the Origin Realm, he can't enter the ruins on the other side.

Now, about 100,000 pieces of high-grade eternal ancient gold had been preserved in the replica body of his territorial sea boundary sea.

It's just that in order not to be exposed, he didn't arrange the Void Floating Origin Array in the gap of the territorial sea boundary before, otherwise that movement would inevitably attract other geniuses from the other side.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body set off from the boundary gap of the territorial sea and went to Wind Tooth Island, preparing to send these high-grade eternal ancient gold to the copy body of Wind Tooth Island, and let him arrange the Void Floating Origin Circle on Wind Tooth Island.

......

Origin Black River.

The two replica bodies met here, handed over the finest Eternal Gold, and then separated.

After one of the replica bodies returned to Wind Tooth Island, they began to arrange the Void Floating Origin Array.

Rumble!!!!

The Void Origin Array was arranged, attracting the attention of a Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"The Lord of Endless has arranged such an Origin Circle again, where did he get so much high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold?"

These Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were very envious one by one, although they were also geniuses on the other side of the Origin Realm, but like those in the Origin Realm in the east, it was also a little difficult to obtain the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold!

Although the treatment given to them on Fengya Island is very good, the high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold in the Land of Eternity is indeed scarce, and this is something that cannot be changed.

There might be more Grade Eternal Ancient Gold in the central region, but there were too many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the central region, and it was even more difficult to obtain the Origin Eternal Ancient Gold.

The Void Origin Circle can last for 5,000 primeval eras.

In the next 5,000 primeval eras, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the origin rules of the other side, and he was also slowly improving.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian was also preparing to collect more high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, and he wanted to build a more powerful Origin Array.

He saw a top-notch Origin Circle on Wind Tooth Island, the Eternal Origin Circle.

The Eternal Origin Law requires 109,600 pieces of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold, plus various precious materials, to be arranged, and this is also the most expensive Origin Array on Wind Tooth Island.

And this magic circle can last 88,888 primeval eras, which is undoubtedly more cost-effective.

However, it was too difficult to make up so much of the finest Eternal Ancient Gold at one time.

Still, you can try.

......

Eastern.

Ye Tian was going to send one of his duplicate bodies to one of the three places of Tai Li, the Shore of the Ao Hai, and the Hades Mansion to collect the Superior Eternal Ancient Gold.

Among them, the Taili Realm and the Shore of the Ao Hai are slightly less dangerous, and if many Origin Realms join forces to enter, the security will skyrocket, and every time you enter, you can also gain something and find a little high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold.

But it was also because the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Realm often entered the shores of the Taili Realm and the Arctic Sea, resulting in a small number of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold in these two treasure lands.

And the ruins on the other side do not allow the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm to enter, and the most suitable place for him at the moment is the Hades Mansion.

The Hades Mansion is very dangerous, at least like the Eternal Zero Lord of Gu Heng Mountain, the Lord of Gu Heng, they definitely don't dare to go to the Hades Mansion, otherwise there is an absolute high probability that they will fall.

Even the other side level genius at the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor level may not dare to enter the Hades Mansion, even if they really want to enter, they only dare to take a stroll around the periphery, if they go to the depths of the Hades Mansion, it is too easy to fall.

But Ye Tian was not afraid of danger, and after collecting some information about the Hades Mansion, he went directly to the Hades Mansion.

Soon.

He came to the House of Hades.

From the outside, the Hades Mansion looks like a huge mansion, but inside it is actually a vast void treasure land that contains many resources.

And because the interior of the Hades Mansion is very dim, and it contains extremely dark energy, and some strange evil creatures have been bred, it is called the Hades Mansion.

Many creatures in the Hades Mansion are very weird, affecting the will of the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, if the will is not strong, in the face of these yin and evil strange creatures, even half of their strength will not be able to be exerted.

Swish!

Ye Tian directly entered the Hades Mansion.

In the dim and unrelated earth, Ye Tian walked in.

There was a dead silence here, but the evil energy was very strong.

"It is rumored that the Hades Mansion has not only bred a lot of high-grade eternal ancient gold, but also many treasures that can help improve the will of the Origin. Ye Tian said darkly.

If he really found such a treasure, he would naturally collect it.

Of course.

His main purpose was to find the finest Eternal Gold.

After a long time, some evil creatures came to attack him.

Rumble!!!!

A group of white creatures appeared all around, hairless, shriveled bodies, seemingly without much flesh and blood, but their aura was very powerful.

【Evil Bone Cultivator】

This is the name of this creature.

The strength of each Evil Bone Sect was quite not weak, equivalent to a weaker Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and for Ye Tian, these creatures were naturally ant-like existences.

Rumble!

Ye Tian made a move, holding the Origin Rule Weapon, and easily smashed these evil bones.

In a short time, all these evil bones were killed by him.

After that, he moved on.

"Although the periphery is very dangerous, some Origin Realm level geniuses have definitely been here, but they should not dare to enter the Hades Mansion, if I go to the depths, I will have hope of finding a large amount of high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went directly towards the depths of the Hades Mansion. ~
